articles.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Stock Could Be Fairly Valued After Record Orders
articles.summary: TE Connectivity stock has returned 59.3% over the past five years, and at around US$201.44 the valuation checks now suggest it is neither a clear bargain nor very stretched. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate sits close to the current price, while the earnings multiples still lean on the inexpensive side. Over five years, a 59.3% return indicates TE Connectivity has already rewarded patient shareholders. Fresh buyers therefore need to think carefully about how much...

articles.title: Is TE Connectivity’s AI and Electrification Order Surge Altering The Investment Case For TEL?
articles.summary: In July 2026, TE Connectivity plc reported its fiscal third-quarter results and hosted an investor call on July 22, following a fiscal second quarter that featured record orders of US$5.30 billion and 15% reported sales growth.
